methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Defense & Security (found 0 same-stage, 1 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 21 same-sector peers exist in Defense & Security, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use

data.narrative:
Ukrspecsystems is a growth-stage defense and security company founded by Kostyuk Vyacheslav Nikolaevich, capitalized through MoD contracts rather than traditional equity raises. The broader Defense & Security sector comprises 21 peers across public and private markets, including 2 public comparables (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and 8 private peers such as Anduril Industries, Scale AI, Saronic, Flock Safety, and Shield AI.

Peer-median valuation analysis is not applicable to Ukrspecsystems. Despite identifying 21 same-sector peers, the company lacks sufficient narrow-filter matches—zero same-stage comparables, one adjacent-stage peer, and zero similar-tier peers. The three-datapoint minimum threshold required for meaningful peer triangulation could not be met. Applying an all-sector median would introduce unacceptable noise given the heterogeneity of defense subsectors and the absence of stage-aligned benchmarks.

Without sufficient comparable transaction or public market data specific to growth-stage defense contractors with MoD-contract capitalization, conventional quantitative valuation methods cannot be reliably applied here. Key uncertainties include the size and sustainability of current MoD contract revenue, capital intensity of scaling operations, and competitive positioning relative to the identified private peer set. A valuation range would require either (1) disclosure of historical MoD contract values and renewal rates, or (2) expansion of the comparable universe to adjacent geographies or subsectors with documented methodological caveats. Further data collection on operating metrics and contract structure is prerequisite to establishing a defensible valuation.
